records.question: Which staff member has the first name Kristian and the last name Lynch?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT staff.staff_id FROM staff
WHERE staff.staff_first_name = 'Kristian' AND staff.staff_last_name = 'Lynch'
records.pred_sql: SELECT staff_id FROM Staff WHERE staff_first_name = 'Kristian' AND staff_last_name = 'Lynch'

records.question: Which staff with the last name Berge have problems currently reported to them?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT staff.staff_id FROM staff
JOIN problem_log ON staff.staff_id = problem_log.assigned_to_staff_id
JOIN problem_status_codes ON problem_log.problem_status_code = problem_status_codes.problem_status_code
WHERE staff.staff_last_name = 'Berge' AND problem_status_codes.problem_status_description = 'Reported'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT s.staff_id
FROM Staff s
JOIN Problems p ON s.staff_id = p.reported_by_staff_id
WHERE s.staff_last_name = 'Berge' AND p.date_problem_closed IS NULL

records.question: Which staff members are assigned to problems where the other problem details are exactly p and the problem description is exactly x?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT staff.staff_id FROM staff
JOIN problem_log ON staff.staff_id = problem_log.assigned_to_staff_id
JOIN problems ON problem_log.problem_id = problems.problem_id
JOIN product ON problems.product_id = product.product_id
WHERE problems.other_problem_details = 'p' AND problems.problem_description = 'x'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT s.staff_id
FROM Staff s
JOIN Problem_Log pl ON s.staff_id = pl.assigned_to_staff_id
JOIN Problems p ON pl.problem_id = p.problem_id
WHERE p.other_problem_details = 'p' AND p.problem_description = 'x'

records.question: Which staff members with other_staff_details exactly b have problem logs where other_log_details is u, log_entry_fix is n, and the log entry date is on or before 1976-09-17 09:01:12?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT staff.staff_id FROM staff
JOIN problem_log ON staff.staff_id = problem_log.assigned_to_staff_id
WHERE problem_log.other_log_details = 'u' AND staff.other_staff_details = 'b' AND problem_log.log_entry_fix = 'n' AND problem_log.log_entry_date <= '1976-09-17 09:01:12'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT s.staff_id
FROM Staff s
JOIN Problem_Log pl ON s.staff_id = pl.assigned_to_staff_id
WHERE s.other_staff_details = 'b'
  AND pl.other_log_details = 'u'
  AND pl.log_entry_fix = 'n'
  AND pl.log_entry_date <= '1976-09-17 09:01:12'

records.question: Which staff members named Kristian Lynch with other details as b are assigned to problems fixed with x that have a log entry dated on 2001-05-14 10:03:53, description d, and other log details d?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT staff.staff_id FROM staff
JOIN problem_log ON staff.staff_id = problem_log.assigned_to_staff_id
WHERE staff.staff_first_name = 'Kristian' AND problem_log.log_entry_date = '2001-05-14 10:03:53' AND problem_log.log_entry_description = 'd' AND staff.staff_last_name = 'Lynch' AND problem_log.other_log_details = 'd' AND staff.other_staff_details = 'b' AND problem_log.log_entry_fix = 'x'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT s.staff_id
FROM Staff s
JOIN Problem_Log pl ON s.staff_id = pl.assigned_to_staff_id
WHERE s.staff_first_name = 'Kristian'
AND s.staff_last_name = 'Lynch'
AND s.other_staff_details = 'b'
AND pl.log_entry_fix = 'x'
AND pl.log_entry_date = '2001-05-14 10:03:53'
AND pl.log_entry_description = 'd'
AND pl.other_log_details = 'd'

records.question: Which staff members with the last name Weber and other details exactly q are assigned to problems reported on or before 1996-04-19 15:54:13 that have a log entry fix exactly o and other log details exactly d?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT staff.staff_id FROM staff
JOIN problem_log ON staff.staff_id = problem_log.assigned_to_staff_id
JOIN problems ON problem_log.problem_id = problems.problem_id
WHERE problem_log.log_entry_fix = 'o' AND problem_log.other_log_details = 'd' AND problems.date_problem_reported <= '1996-04-19 15:54:13' AND staff.staff_last_name = 'Weber' AND staff.other_staff_details = 'q'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT s.staff_id
FROM Staff s
JOIN Problem_Log pl ON s.staff_id = pl.assigned_to_staff_id
JOIN Problems p ON pl.problem_id = p.problem_id
WHERE s.staff_last_name = 'Weber'
AND s.other_staff_details = 'q'
AND p.date_problem_reported <= '1996-04-19 15:54:13'
AND pl.log_entry_fix = 'o'
AND pl.other_log_details = 'd'

records.question: Which staff members named Christop Berge handled problems with description c and other details f that were closed on or after 2004-06-20 01:08:25, where their log entries have description p and fix i?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT staff.staff_id FROM staff
JOIN problem_log ON staff.staff_id = problem_log.assigned_to_staff_id
JOIN problems ON problem_log.problem_id = problems.problem_id
WHERE problems.other_problem_details = 'f' AND problems.date_problem_closed >= '2004-06-20 01:08:25' AND staff.staff_first_name = 'Christop' AND problem_log.log_entry_description = 'p' AND problem_log.log_entry_fix = 'i' AND staff.staff_last_name = 'Berge' AND problems.problem_description = 'c'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT s.staff_id
FROM Staff s
JOIN Problem_Log pl ON s.staff_id = pl.assigned_to_staff_id
JOIN Problems p ON pl.problem_id = p.problem_id
WHERE s.staff_first_name = 'Christop'
AND s.staff_last_name = 'Berge'
AND p.problem_description = 'c'
AND p.other_problem_details = 'f'
AND p.date_problem_closed >= '2004-06-20 01:08:25'
AND pl.log_entry_description = 'p'
AND pl.log_entry_fix = 'i'

records.question: Which staff members are assigned to problems where the log entry description is b and the other log details are e?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT staff.staff_id FROM staff
JOIN problem_log ON staff.staff_id = problem_log.assigned_to_staff_id
WHERE problem_log.log_entry_description = 'b' AND problem_log.other_log_details = 'e'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT s.staff_id
FROM Staff s
JOIN Problem_Log pl ON s.staff_id = pl.assigned_to_staff_id
WHERE pl.log_entry_description = 'b' AND pl.other_log_details = 'e'

records.question: Which staff members named Ashley Medhurst have other staff details exactly as w?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT staff.staff_id FROM staff
WHERE staff.other_staff_details = 'w' AND staff.staff_last_name = 'Medhurst' AND staff.staff_first_name = 'Ashley'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT staff_id
FROM Staff
WHERE staff_first_name = 'Ashley' AND staff_last_name = 'Medhurst' AND other_staff_details = 'w'

records.question: Which staff with the last name Klein and other_staff_details exactly p handled fixed problem logs with other_log_details exactly c on or after 1997-08-31 08:19:12, involving problems reported on or before 1993-12-29 23:22:21 that have other_problem_details exactly s for the wechat product?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT staff.staff_id FROM staff
JOIN problem_log ON staff.staff_id = problem_log.assigned_to_staff_id
JOIN problems ON problem_log.problem_id = problems.problem_id
JOIN product ON problems.product_id = product.product_id
WHERE problems.other_problem_details = 's' AND problem_log.log_entry_date >= '1997-08-31 08:19:12' AND staff.other_staff_details = 'p' AND problem_log.log_entry_fix = 'y' AND problems.date_problem_reported <= '1993-12-29 23:22:21' AND staff.staff_last_name = 'Klein' AND problem_log.other_log_details = 'c' AND product.product_name = 'wechat'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT s.staff_id
FROM Staff s
JOIN Problem_Log pl ON s.staff_id = pl.assigned_to_staff_id
JOIN Problems p ON pl.problem_id = p.problem_id
JOIN Product prod ON p.product_id = prod.product_id
WHERE s.staff_last_name = 'Klein'
AND s.other_staff_details = 'p'
AND pl.problem_status_code = 'fixed'
AND pl.other_log_details = 'c'
AND pl.log_entry_date >= '1997-08-31 08:19:12'
AND p.date_problem_reported <= '1993-12-29 23:22:21'
AND p.other_problem_details = 's'
AND prod.product_name = 'wechat'
